title: chromolaena ortegae
intro: Chromolaena ortegae, also known as tree lettuce or Jacob's coat, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have various medicinal benefits. The health benefits of Chromolaena ortegae include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
